title: Buttery Dense Brazilian Rice Noodles Stew
description: A rich, buttery stew featuring tender rice noodles, savory chicken, and fresh vegetables, perfect for a lazy Sunday lunch or dinner.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for another 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the chicken cubes to the pot and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the chicken broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a gentle simmer.
Add the sliced carrots, celery, and diced bell pepper, and let the mixture simmer until the vegetables are tender, approximately 10 minutes.
Stir in the cooked rice noodles and melted butter, mixing until the noodles are well coated and the stew has thickened slightly.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Remove from heat and let the stew sit for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
Serve hot in bowls, enjoying the buttery, dense texture of the stew.
